title: Seasoned Ground Beef Tacos
description: Quick and flavorful ground beef tacos with homemade seasoning, fresh toppings, and warm tortillas.

steps.instruction: Brown ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat, breaking up the meat. Drain excess fat.
Mix together chili powder, cumin, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, and pepper. Add to the meat.
Pour in water and stir. Simmer 3–4 minutes until the sauce thickens and coats the meat.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet or directly over a gas flame.
Build your tacos: spoon beef into tortillas, then pile on cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, avocado, and sour cream.
Serve with lime wedges and your favorite hot sauce.

notes: Set up a taco bar with all the toppings for a fun family dinner where everyone builds their own!
